## Summary

Briefly describe the user-visible change and why it is needed. Keep this short.

## Reviewer focus

Point reviewers at the riskiest logic, tradeoffs, or places you want extra scrutiny.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Not run yet. Reason:

## UI impact

- [ ] No user-facing UI changes

If this PR changes user-facing UI, complete all of the items below before requesting review:

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] `docs/ui-ux-style-guide.md` updated
- [ ] `docs/screenshots/` updated
- [ ] I checked the UI against the AGENTVIZ style guide

## AI review

- [ ] I reviewed for duplicate, unused, or dead code
- [ ] I used AI review assistance
- [ ] I used more than one model or tool to review the PR

## Notes

Anything else a reviewer should know: follow-ups, intentional omissions, or edge cases.
